scripts.check:backend: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run test:cleaning-rules --prefix backend && npm run test:cleaning-inspection-merge --prefix backend && npm run test:app-notification-policies --prefix backend && npm run test:guest-luggage-rules --prefix backend && npm run test:orders-overlap --prefix backend && npm run test:auto-expense-source-summary --prefix backend && npm run test:company-revenue-report --prefix backend
scripts.check:frontend: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.check:mobile: if [ -f mz-cleaning-app-frontend/package.json ]; then npm run typecheck --prefix mz-cleaning-app-frontend && npm run lint --prefix mz-cleaning-app-frontend && npm run test --prefix mz-cleaning-app-frontend; else echo check:mobile skipped: mz-cleaning-app-frontend/package.json not found; fi
scripts.check: npm run check:ledger && npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend && npm run check:mobile
